title: Cannot Access Admin Dashboard
description: Customer reports being unable to reach the admin dashboard after a recent password change. The page returns a 403 Forbidden error every time.

title: Duplicate Charge on Invoice
description: Customer was billed twice for the same order placed on February 28th. They are requesting an immediate refund for the duplicate transaction.

title: Profile Picture Upload Failing
description: Every time the customer tries to upload a new profile picture, they receive a 'File too large' error even though the image is under 1MB.

title: Notification Emails Going to Spam
description: The customer has confirmed that all system notification emails are landing in their spam folder. They need help with email whitelisting instructions.

title: App Freezing on Checkout Page
description: The mobile application freezes completely when the customer tries to proceed from the cart to the checkout page. Happens on both iOS and Android.

title: Unable to Cancel Active Subscription
description: Customer wants to cancel their monthly plan but the cancel button is greyed out in account settings. They need the subscription stopped before next billing cycle.

title: Search Results Not Loading
description: The search bar on the product page returns a blank screen instead of results. The issue started after the latest platform update on March 1st.

title: Wrong Item Delivered
description: Customer ordered a blue jacket (size L) but received a red hoodie (size M). They need an exchange arranged as soon as possible.

title: Password Reset Link Not Arriving
description: Customer has requested a password reset three times but never receives the email. Their account is currently inaccessible.

title: CSV Data Export Producing Empty File
description: When the customer exports their order history as a CSV, the downloaded file is completely empty. The feature was working fine two weeks ago.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Code Invalid
description: The 6-digit 2FA code sent via SMS is being rejected as invalid even when entered immediately. Customer is locked out of their account.

title: Dashboard Charts Not Displaying
description: All analytics charts on the customer dashboard are showing a blank white box with no data. The rest of the page loads correctly.

title: Promo Code Not Applying Discount
description: Customer has a valid promo code for 20% off but the discount is not being applied at checkout. The code is confirmed active until end of March.
